text: A street view of a two-story building painted yellow, featuring three arched windows with brown shutters on the upper floor. A blue and white metal fence runs along the sidewalk in front of the building, separating it from the road. The building has a weathered lower section and a poster is visible on the wall. Trees and utility poles are present on the left side.
